curation_notes: Primary location derived from the patch diff which modifies src/lib/sqlBuilder.js. The patch adds escapeId() calls from the sqlstring library to sanitize table names, column names, and ID key names in all three SQL builder functions (getInsertSql, getUpdateSql, getDelSql). Only 1 non-test source file was changed. Sibling files in src/lib/ (pool.js, models.js, rule.js, sqlContainer.js) were checked but none construct SQL from user-supplied identifiers. Pre-assigned class sql-injection (CWE-89) confirmed correct from the diff.
